race_meta.race_name: National Hunt Challenge Cup Novices' Handicap Chase (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked holloway queen at position 6 with only 7.0% probability. Top pick was Grand Geste (14.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Grand Geste > Newton Tornado, but actual result was Holloway Queen > King of Answers. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Holloway Queen had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.1%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
